fields.name: Foundation
fields.description: 3 Months | 12 Weeks — Zero tech experience needed. Absolute beginners welcome.
features: 2 classes per week via Zoom or WhatsApp Video
All class recordings — rewatch anytime, forever

fields.name: Professional
fields.description: 4 Months | 16 Weeks — For those ready to build real skills and a real portfolio.
features: 3 live classes + 1 practical lab session per week

fields.name: Elite
fields.description: 5 Months | 20 Weeks — For those who want to become true experts and earn seriously.
features: Full access to ALL instructor project source codes
RAT, Ransomware & Location Tracker lab projects
Red Team vs. Blue Team live simulation exercises
Career guidance: bug bounties, freelancing, job placement
CV review, LinkedIn optimisation, portfolio coaching

fields.title: Cybersecurity Overview & Ethical Hacking Fundamentals
fields.description: Phase 0A: Understand the world you are entering. What cybersecurity means in simple everyday language, how Nigerian banks and companies get attacked daily, and the real earning potential of ethical hackers in Nigeria and internationally.
fields.short_description: Understand cybersecurity from scratch — what it is, who does it, and why it matters in Nigeria.
what_you_learn: What cybersecurity means in plain language
How Nigerian companies get attacked daily
Difference between internet, dark web, and deep web
Real earning potential: bug bounties, freelance pentesting
Key terminologies: vulnerability, exploit, payload, malware

fields.title: Linux for Hackers — Complete Mastery
fields.description: Phase 2: Linux is a hacker's home. Master the Linux command line, file permissions, user accounts, bash scripting, and 50+ essential commands every ethical hacker must know. Complete hands-on labs simulate real-world hacker scenarios.
fields.short_description: Master Linux from the command line — 50+ essential commands, bash scripting, and real hacker scenarios.
what_you_learn: Linux file system structure and navigation
50+ essential Linux commands
Bash scripting for automation
User accounts, permissions, and root access
Network commands: ifconfig, netstat, curl, nmap

fields.title: Web Application Hacking — OWASP Top 10
fields.description: Phase 5: The skills that make clients pay serious money. Deep dive into OWASP Top 10 with live demos and hands-on labs. SQL injection, XSS, broken authentication, IDOR, and security misconfiguration — all with Burp Suite end-to-end.
fields.short_description: Identify, exploit and remediate the OWASP Top 10 — with live demos and real labs using Burp Suite.
what_you_learn: SQL Injection: extract a full database
Cross-Site Scripting (XSS): steal session cookies
Broken Authentication bypass
IDOR: access other users' private data
Burp Suite: spider, scanner, repeater, intruder

fields.title: Reconnaissance & OSINT Mastery
fields.description: Phase 6: Information is power. Hackers spend 70% of their time here. Master passive and active reconnaissance using Google Dorking, Shodan, WHOIS, DNS enumeration, social media OSINT, and Nmap advanced scanning.
fields.short_description: Master passive and active recon — Google Dorking, Shodan, OSINT, and Nmap deep scanning.
what_you_learn: Google Dorking for hidden files and login pages
Shodan: the Google for hackers
WHOIS, DNS enumeration, subdomain discovery
Social media OSINT: Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter
Active recon: Nmap aggressive scans, OS detection

fields.title: Defensive Security & Blue Team Operations
fields.description: Phase 9: What makes Eccentric Academy unique — most hacking courses never teach defence. Learn firewalls, IDS/IPS, SIEM systems, endpoint protection, incident response, and digital forensics. Includes Red vs. Blue Team live simulation.
fields.short_description: Master firewalls, IDS, SIEM, incident response, and digital forensics — the Blue Team perspective.
what_you_learn: Firewall types and configuration
IDS and IPS: your digital security guards
SIEM: detecting attacks in real time
Digital forensics: recovering deleted files
Incident response: what to do in the first 60 minutes

fields.title: Web Development with Django — Full Stack
fields.description: Programme 3: Build real, secure web applications from scratch using HTML/CSS, JavaScript, Python, and Django. Covers the full stack from front-end foundations to deployment on a live server. Security-first development built in from day one.
fields.short_description: Build real, secure Django web apps from scratch — HTML to deployment. Used by Instagram and Pinterest.
what_you_learn: HTML, CSS, and JavaScript foundations
Python fundamentals in plain language
Django MVT pattern and URL routing
Database design with PostgreSQL
REST APIs and security-first development
Full deployment to a live server with real URL
